notes.anchor: M. CICERO P. SERVILIO CONLEGAE S.
notes.note: The letter-heading; conlega ("colleague") marks the recipient as Cicero's fellow-member of the college of augurs. He is P. Servilius Vatia Isauricus the younger (consul 48 BC), then proconsul of Asia (46-44 BC); 13.70-72 form a group addressed to him there.
A freedman (libertus) bore his former master's nomen, here Ampius, marking him as a member of the patron's extended household; recommending such a man honoured the patron as much as the freedman.
